title: Pay and gender equity | Employment New Zealand
content:
## Pay and gender equity
An employee’s pay, conditions, experiences in the workplace and access to jobs should not be affected by gender. This section has a range of pay and gender information and resources.
- Meeting your pay equity obligations Guidance for employers on ensuring pay equity between men and women in your organisation.

## Meeting your pay equity obligations
Guidance for employers on ensuring pay equity between men and women in your organisation.
- Evaluation of equitable jobs Job evaluation or sizing is the process to work out the ‘size‘ of a job relative to other jobs that are similar or the same in value.

## Evaluation of equitable jobs
Job evaluation or sizing is the process to work out the ‘size‘ of a job relative to other jobs that are similar or the same in value.
- Raising a pay equity claim Find out about the process for employees and unions to raise a pay equity claim.

## Raising a pay equity claim
Find out about the process for employees and unions to raise a pay equity claim.
- Responding to a pay equity claim If you are an employer who has received a pay equity claim, you should follow this guidance to respond to the claim.

## Responding to a pay equity claim
If you are an employer who has received a pay equity claim, you should follow this guidance to respond to the claim.
- Submitting or requesting pay equity data Find out how to submit your pay equity data or request pay equity data.

## Submitting or requesting pay equity data
Find out how to submit your pay equity data or request pay equity data.
